meta.educational_goal: Explore and understand dynamic typing in JavaScript.

states.label: Idle
entry_actions: showTypeInfo('Click buttons to explore dynamic typing')
evidence: showTypeInfo('Click buttons to explore dynamic typing')

states.label: Object Created
evidence: const obj = {number: Math.floor(Math.random() * 100), string: 'property', boolean: Math.random() > 0.5, method: function() { return this.number; }};

states.label: Function Created
evidence: const func = function(a, b) { return a + b; };

events.description: Create a random number and show its type information.
Create a random string and show its type information.
Create a random boolean and show its type information.
Create a random array and show its type information.
Create a random object and show its type information.
evidence: document.getElementById('createObject').addEventListener('click', () => { const obj = {number: Math.floor(Math.random() * 100), string: 'property', boolean: Math.random() > 0.5, method: function() { return this.number; }}; showTypeInfo(obj); });

events.description: Create a function and show its type information.
evidence: document.getElementById('createFunction').addEventListener('click', () => { const func = function(a, b) { return a + b; }; showTypeInfo(func); });

events.description: Evaluate a custom value input and show its type information.
evidence: document.getElementById('evaluateCustom').addEventListener('click', () => { try { const value = eval(document.getElementById('customValue').value); showTypeInfo(value); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Error: ${e.message}`); } });

events.description: Convert the last value to the selected type and show its type information.
evidence: document.getElementById('convertValue').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const conversionType = document.getElementById('conversionType').value; let converted; try { switch (conversionType) { case 'string': converted = String(lastValue); break; case 'number': converted = Number(lastValue); break; case 'boolean': converted = Boolean(lastValue); break; } showTypeInfo(converted); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Conversion error: ${e.message}`); } });

events.description: Create a variable with the last value and update the variable list.
evidence: document.getElementById('createVar').addEventListener('click', () => { const varName = document.getElementById('varName').value.trim(); if (varName && lastValue !== null) { variables[varName] = lastValue; updateVariableList(); } });

events.description: Perform addition with the last value.
evidence: document.getElementById('addOperation').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to add:'); try { const result = lastValue + Number(other); showTypeInfo(result); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Error: ${e.message}`); } });

events.description: Perform concatenation with the last value.
evidence: document.getElementById('concatOperation').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to concatenate:'); const result = lastValue + String(other); showTypeInfo(result); });

events.description: Perform comparison (==) with the last value.
evidence: document.getElementById('compareOperation').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to compare (==):'); try { const result = lastValue == other; showTypeInfo(result); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Error: ${e.message}`); } });

events.description: Perform strict comparison (===) with the last value.
evidence: document.getElementById('strictCompareOperation').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to strictly compare (===):'); try { const result = lastValue === other; showTypeInfo(result); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Error: ${e.message}`); } });

events.description: Increment the last value if it is a number.
evidence: document.getElementById('increment').addEventListener('click', () => { if (typeof lastValue === 'number') { showTypeInfo(++lastValue); } else { showTypeInfo('Can only increment numbers'); } });

events.description: Decrement the last value if it is a number.
evidence: document.getElementById('decrement').addEventListener('click', () => { if (typeof lastValue === 'number') { showTypeInfo(--lastValue); } else { showTypeInfo('Can only decrement numbers'); } });

events.description: Multiply the last value by another value.
evidence: document.getElementById('multiply').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to multiply by:'); try { const result = lastValue * Number(other); showTypeInfo(result); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Error: ${e.message}`); } });

events.description: Divide the last value by another value.
evidence: document.getElementById('divide').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to divide by:'); try { const result = lastValue / Number(other); showTypeInfo(result); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Error: ${e.message}`); } });

events.description: Evaluate a mathematical expression input and show the result.
evidence:
document.getElementById('evaluateExpression').addEventListener('click', () => { try { const expr = document.getElementById('expressionInput').value; const result = eval(expr); expressionResult.innerHTML = `

Result: ${result}

Type: ${typeof result}

`; } catch (e) { expressionResult.innerHTML = `Error: ${e.message}`; } });

document.getElementById('createObject').addEventListener('click', () => { const obj = {number: Math.floor(Math.random() * 100), string: 'property', boolean: Math.random() > 0.5, method: function() { return this.number; }}; showTypeInfo(obj); });
document.getElementById('createFunction').addEventListener('click', () => { const func = function(a, b) { return a + b; }; showTypeInfo(func); });

document.getElementById('concatOperation').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to concatenate:'); const result = lastValue + String(other); showTypeInfo(result); });

document.getElementById('compareOperation').addEventListener('click', () => { if (lastValue === null) return; const other = prompt('Enter value to compare (==):'); try { const result = lastValue == other; showTypeInfo(result); } catch (e) { showTypeInfo(`Error: ${e.message}`); } });

document.getElementById('decrement').addEventListener('click', () => { if (typeof lastValue === 'number') { showTypeInfo(--lastValue); } else { showTypeInfo('Can only decrement numbers'); } });
